case_title: DILIP HOSSAIN VS. MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-23-2011 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,350.00 FILED BY HOSSAIN, DILIP AS TO DEFENDANT MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-09-2011 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOSSAIN, DILIP IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
